title: Core Plants
description: This mod will add some new plants into the game and help you get more core.
body:
This mod is made with MCreator

This Minecraft ore seed mod redefines resource gathering with innovative, game-changing mechanics that bring fresh depth to exploration and survival! It introduces unique ore seeds for every vanilla and modded ore type, turning one-time ore mining into a sustainable, repeatable process—plant the seeds on farmland or specific biomes, and harvest fully grown ore blocks at steady intervals. No more endless cave diving for rare resources; the mod balances progression by tying seed rarity to ore value, with rarer ores requiring longer growth times or special growing conditions. It seamlessly integrates with vanilla farming systems and most modded tool/biome mods, adding a strategic farming layer to Minecraft’s core loop. Perfect for casual players seeking relaxed resource collection and hardcore crafters building self-sufficient bases, it’s a creative twist that makes resource management more engaging and rewarding for all playstyles.

模组是用MCreator做成的

这款矿石种子模组以极具创意、颠覆玩法的机制重新定义了资源收集，为探索与生存玩法注入全新深度！模组为所有原版及模组新增矿石打造了专属矿石种子，将一次性的矿石挖掘转化为可持续、可重复的获取方式——只需把种子种在耕地或特定生物群系，每隔固定时间就能收获成熟的矿石块。无需再为稀缺资源无休止地深入矿洞探索；模组还实现了玩法平衡，将种子稀有度与矿石价值挂钩，稀有度越高的矿石，种植所需的生长时间更长、培育条件也更为特殊。

该模组能与原版种植系统及绝大多数工具、生物群系类模组无缝兼容，为《我的世界》核心玩法循环增添了策略性种植的全新维度。无论是想轻松收集资源的休闲玩家，还是致力于打造自给自足基地的硬核建造者，这款模组都能适配。这一创意改动让资源管理玩法变得更具趣味性与成就感，完美适配各类游玩风格。
